tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat /etc/resolv.conf && printf '\n---\n' && ls  -l /etc/resolv.conf && printf '\n---\n' && readlink -f /etc/resolv.conf || true  -l /etc/resolv.conf && printf '\n---\n' && readlink -f /etc/resolv.conf || true

send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
python3 - <<'PY'
> import socket
> for host in ['mycaldera.caldera','example.com']:
>     try:
>         print(host, socket.getaddrinfo(host, 80)[0][4][0])

example.com ERR [Errno -3] Temporary failure in name resolution
